    Sofia's Place is a Mexican restaurant in Wauconda, Illinois, known for authentic dishes like tacos, burritos, and fajitas, with popular specials such as Taco Tuesday deals and various dinner options. It offers dine-in, takeout, and delivery, and is located inside Lucky Danny's. The menu includes a wide range of choices, from classic Mexican fare to other items like BBQ ribs and steak dinners, along with desserts and drinks like margaritas. 
    Links
      +6
      Sofia's Place is a Mexican restaurant in Wauconda, Illinois, known for authentic dishes like tacos, burritos, and fajitas, with popular specials such as Taco Tuesday deals and various dinner options. It offers dine-in, takeout, and delivery, and is located inside Lucky Danny's. The menu includes a wide range of choices, from classic Mexican fare to other items like BBQ ribs and steak dinners, along with desserts and drinks like margaritas. 
      Menu highlights
      • Tacos: Options include steak, shrimp, pastor (marinated pork), chicken, and fish, often served as a dinner with rice and beans. 
      • Dinners: A variety of dinner plates like enchiladas, chimichangas, and fajitas. 
      • Burritos: Choices like the steak burrito with beans, lettuce, tomatoes, cheese, and sour cream. 
      • Appetizers: Guacamole, choriqueso, and loaded fries. 
      • Specials: Taco Tuesday deals (e.g., $2 tacos with cilantro & onion) and other daily specials. 
      • Drinks: Margaritas and horchata. 
      • Desserts: Flan, cheesecake, and red velvet cake. 
      Service options
      • Dine-in, takeout, and delivery (via services like DoorDash and Grubhub).
      • Catering services are also available.
